name: file-wizard
tagline: A lightweight web application for basic file management and sharing
description: Filewizard is a lightweight web application for file management, supporting directory navigation, uploads and sharing. It has a minimal UI and can be deployed quickly using Docker for self-hosted scenarios and local personal file sharing.

features.title: File Upload Interface
features.description: Upload files through a web-based interface

features.title: File Management
features.description: Browse, rename, and delete uploaded files

features.title: Directory Navigation
features.description: Navigate folders within the file storage

features.title: Simple Web UI
features.description: Access file operations using a minimal browser interface
